# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Google Cloud Deployment Manager template for a Cloud Storage bucket to host static website assets. Grant allUsers read access so the website can serve files publicly. Set storageClass to STANDARD for performance. This is for our public-facing website storage on GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: website-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: website-bucket
    storageClass: STANDARD
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: index.html
      notFoundPage: 404.html
    iamPolicy:
      bindings:
      - role: roles/storage.objectViewer
        members:
        - allUsers
    cors:
    - origin: ['*']
      method: ['GET', 'HEAD', 'OPTIONS']
      responseHeader: ['*']
      maxAgeSeconds: 3600
    logging:
      logBucket: website-logs-bucket
      logObjectPrefix: ''
    versioning:
      enabled: true
    lifecycle:
      rule:
      - action:
          type: Delete
        condition:
          age: 30
    encryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: projects/my-project/locations/us-central1/keyRings/my-key-ring/cryptoKeys/my-key
    labels:
      environment: production
      website: my-website
    location: US
    project: my-project
    bucket: website-bucket
    defaultObjectAcl:
    - entity: allUsers
      role: READERS
    - entity: allAuthenticatedUsers
      role: READERS
    - entity: projectOwner
      role: OWNER
    - entity: projectEditor
      role: OWNER
    - entity: projectViewer
      role: READER
    - entity: serviceAccount:my-service-account@my-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com
      role: OWNER
    - entity: serviceAccount:my-service-account@my-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com
      role: READER
    - entity: serviceAccount:my-service-account@my-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com
      role: WRITER
    - entity: serviceAccount:my-service-account@my-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com
      role: STORAGE_OBJECT_VIEWER
    - entity: serviceAccount:my-service-account@my-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com
      role: STORAGE_OBJECT_ADMIN
    - entity: serviceAccount:my-service-account@my-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com
      role: STORAGE_OBJECT_CREATOR
    - entity: serviceAccount:my-service-account@my-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com
      role: STORAGE_OBJECT_DELETER
    - entity: serviceAccount:my-service-account@my-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com
      role: STORAGE_OBJECT_READER
